summary: 83 tests passed, 95.0% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.criterion_text: Create guardkit/planning/graphiti_design.py with SystemDesignGraphiti class: GROUP constants (project_design, api_contracts), upsert_design_decision, upsert_api_contract, upsert_data_model, search_design_context, has_design_context, get_design_decisions, get_api_contracts. Thread-safe (follows SystemPlanGraphiti pattern).
completion_promises.evidence: Created guardkit/planning/graphiti_design.py with SystemDesignGraphiti class containing: DESIGN_GROUP='project_design' and CONTRACTS_GROUP='api_contracts' constants; upsert_design_decision(decision), upsert_api_contract(contract), upsert_data_model(model), search_design_context(query, num_results), has_design_context(), get_design_decisions(), get_api_contracts() methods. All follow SystemPlanGraphiti pattern exactly: upsert_episode() for writes, get_group_id() for namespace prefixing, graceful degradation with None/[]/False returns, [Graphiti] log prefix. Thread-safe (stateless methods, no shared mutable state). 30 async tests verify all behaviors including disabled/null client, exception handling, group prefixing, entity_id formats.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Create guardkit/planning/design_writer.py with DesignWriter class: write_ddr (renders ddr.md.j2), write_api_contract (renders api-contract.md.j2), write_data_model (writes data model markdown), write_component_diagram (renders component-l3.md.j2). Output directory docs/design/ with subdirectories decisions/, contracts/, models/, diagrams/. Creates directories if they don't exist.
completion_promises.evidence: Created guardkit/planning/design_writer.py with DesignWriter class containing: write_ddr(decision, output_dir) rendering ddr.md.j2 to decisions/DDR-NNN.md; write_api_contract(contract, output_dir) rendering api-contract.md.j2 to contracts/API-{slug}.md; write_data_model(model, output_dir) generating markdown to models/DM-{slug}.md; write_component_diagram(container, components, output_dir) rendering component-l3.md.j2 to diagrams/{slug}.md. All methods create subdirectories with mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True). Updated templates ddr.md.j2, api-contract.md.j2, component-l3.md.j2 to match actual entity structures. 20 tests verify directory creation, file naming, and content rendering.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Add scan_next_ddr_number(decisions_dir: Path) -> int helper function
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented scan_next_ddr_number(decisions_dir: Path) -> int in guardkit/planning/design_writer.py. Scans for DDR-NNN.md files using regex pattern, returns max(N)+1. Returns 1 for nonexistent or empty directories. Ignores non-DDR files (README.md, ADR-SP-001.md, etc.). Handles gaps in numbering. 5 tests verify all edge cases: empty dir, nonexistent dir, max number detection, non-DDR file filtering, gap handling.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Both classes have comprehensive unit tests
completion_promises.evidence: Created tests/unit/planning/test_graphiti_design_and_writer.py with 83 tests organized in 15 test classes. Coverage: graphiti_design.py at 95%, design_writer.py at 97%. Tests cover: constructor/availability (6), upsert_design_decision (8), upsert_api_contract (8), upsert_data_model (8), search_design_context (6), has_design_context (5), get_design_decisions (5), get_api_contracts (5), write_ddr (6), write_api_contract (5), write_data_model (5), write_component_diagram (4), scan_next_ddr_number (5), logging (4), integration (3). All 83 tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Integration test: create entities, write via DesignWriter, verify file output
completion_promises.evidence: TestIntegration class contains 3 integration tests: test_create_design_decision_and_write (creates DesignDecision, writes DDR, verifies file content with entity_id, title, context/decision/rationale/consequences sections), test_create_api_contract_and_write (creates ApiContract, writes contract, verifies bounded context, endpoints, protocol, version), test_create_data_model_and_write (creates DataModel, writes model, verifies entities and invariants). All integration tests pass.
